summary: A service/business web app with admin and customer-facing features including WhatsApp/mobile chat, editable contact info, services list, quotation requests with file uploads, delivery pricing, and hourly reminders. New features being added: admin-editable contact us section, customer-facing project gallery with pictures and details, and admin login triggered from admin icon.
architectural_notes: Admin authentication is initiated via an admin icon click; post-login state unlocks admin-only features
Project Gallery is publicly visible to customers and managed by admin (add/edit pictures and details)

existing_features.title: Ensure the Contact Us page admin editing capability is accessible from the admin dashboard at any time. The ContactInfoManagementPage must be linked from the admin dashboard quick-link cards so admins can navigate to it directly to update email, phone, address, and Google Maps link. The link should be clearly labeled 'Edit Contact Info' and protected by AdminGuard.

Make the Project Gallery page fully public and customer-facing. Remove any admin-only gate or authentication requirement for viewing projects. The gallery must display project images, titles, descriptions, and categories for all visitors (logged in or not). The add/edit/delete project controls must remain visible only to authenticated admins.

Add a project detail modal or expanded view on the ProjectGalleryPage so that when a customer clicks a project card, a full-screen or overlay dialog opens showing the project image at larger size, title, full description, and category label.

Add an admin icon (e.g., a shield or user-cog icon) to the app header or bottom navigation bar. When clicked, unauthenticated users are navigated to the AdminLoginPage. When an admin is already logged in, clicking the icon navigates directly to the AdminDashboardPage, bypassing the login page.

new_feature_requests.summary: Admin can edit Contact Us section anytime from admin panel
Customer-facing Project Gallery showing pictures and project details
Admin login triggered by clicking the admin icon; admin features accessible after login
